title: Need help with Google Calendar integration - small team of 3
excerpt: We are a small team of 3 and cannot, cannot figure out how to integrate Google Calendar.  Need help, however, we are probably not the right client for a consulting company that mainly handles enterprise situations/compan…

posts.author: GrandKathryn (KathrynWallace)
posts.cookedHtml: We are a small team of 3 and cannot, cannot figure out how to integrate Google Calendar. Need help, however, we are probably not the right client for a consulting company that mainly handles enterprise situations/companies…

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @GrandKathryn! No, we want to help all accounts of any size! You are important to us too! Are you still experiencing some issues integrating Google Calendar? If so, can you let us know at support@monday.com? Our team will be able to walk you through it there!
